details.note: Kobalte Slider wrapper with showTicks, tickInterval, formatValue props. Uses Kobalte.ValueLabel with getValueLabel for accessible value display.
Full CSS with horizontal/vertical orientation, tick marks, disabled state, reduced motion support. Thumb positioning handled by Kobalte inline styles.
Stories: Playground, WithTicks, Vertical, AllStates with docs and argTypes
Kobalte Slider thumb positioning uses inline styles (left: calc(X%), transform: translateX(-50%)), not CSS variables. ValueLabel uses getValueLabel callback from Root props.
